texto: We suffered a terrible blow on 11 September 2001. We responded with fear and anger. A fight-or-flight response is adaptive in any species. For us, given our power, fight was the only response we could imagine.
explicacao: Citação de Yochai Benkler sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “We suffered a terrible blow on 11 September 2001. We responded with fear and anger. A fight-or-fl…” articula coragem, fear, power em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como power e fight.

texto: Judges wear legal professionalism and precedent as a mantel that secures legitimacy for their decisions. It's how they distinguish themselves from politicians or administrative agencies, while wielding power that is sometimes much greater than those democratically accountable actors.
explicacao: Citação de Yochai Benkler sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Judges wear legal professionalism and precedent as a mantel that secures legitimacy for their dec…” articula tempo, decisions, legal em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como legal.

frase_original: Judges wear legal professionalism and precedent as a mantel that secures legitimacy for their decisions. It's how they distinguish themselves from politicians or administrative agencies, while wielding power that is sometimes much greater than those democratically accountable actors.
